member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Billing.Entities.BillingRatecard
member.summary: Billing ratecard entity - defines billing rates per partner/order type

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Billing.Entities.Invoice.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this invoice

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Buildings.Entities.Building
member.summary: Building entity - represents buildings where installations occur

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Buildings.Entities.BuildingType
member.summary: BuildingType entity - represents building types (Prelaid, Non-Prelaid, SDU, RDF_POLE)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Buildings.Entities.Splitter
member.summary: Splitter entity - represents splitters in buildings

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Buildings.Entities.SplitterPort
member.summary: Splitter port entity - represents individual ports on a splitter

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Common.CompanyScopedEntity
member.summary: Base entity class for all company-scoped entities

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Common.CompanyScopedEntity.CompanyId
member.summary: Company ID this entity belongs to (nullable since company feature removed)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Common.CompanyScopedEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the entity was created

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Common.CompanyScopedEntity.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the entity was last updated

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.Company
member.summary: Company entity - represents a legal entity using CephasOps

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument
member.summary: Company document entity - stores legal, banking, tax, contract documents per company

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.DocumentType
member.summary: Document type (free text or lookup: "Bank Facility", "Tenancy Agreement", "SSM Certificate", etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.FileId
member.summary: File ID reference to Files table

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.EffectiveDate
member.summary: Effective date (when document comes into effect)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.ExpiryDate
member.summary: Expiry date (critical for tenancy, insurance, licences)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.IsCritical
member.summary: Whether this is a critical document (things you NEVER want to lose)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.CompanyDocument.RelatedEntityId
member.summary: Related entity ID (polymorphic reference) e.g., link Vendor Agreement to Vendor, PPA to Project

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.Partner
member.summary: Partner entity - represents partners like TIME, Celcom, etc.

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.PartnerGroup
member.summary: Partner group entity - logical grouping of partners

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Companies.Entities.Vertical
member.summary: Vertical entity - represents business verticals (ISP, Retail, Travel, Barbershop, Mixed, etc.)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Departments.Entities.MaterialAllocation
member.summary: Material allocation entity (materials allocated to departments)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File
member.summary: Represents a stored file in the system (photos, PDFs, dockets, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.FileName
member.summary: Original file name as uploaded by the user

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.StoragePath
member.summary: Storage path in the file system or object storage Format: files/{companyId}/{module}/{year}/{month}/{fileId}.{ext}

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.ContentType
member.summary: MIME type of the file (e.g., image/jpeg, application/pdf)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.CreatedById
member.summary: ID of the user or service installer who uploaded the file

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.Module
member.summary: Optional module/category this file belongs to (e.g., "Orders", "RMA", "SIApp")

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Files.Entities.File.EntityId
member.summary: Optional reference to the entity this file is attached to (e.g., OrderId, RmaTicketId)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.Material.Category
member.summary: Category (Router, ONU, Cable, Patchcord, Connector, Splitter, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.Material.IsSerialised
member.summary: Whether this material requires serial number tracking

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.Material.UnitOfMeasure
member.summary: Unit of measure (pcs, m, kg, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.Material.DepartmentId
member.summary: Department ID (required - materials must be assigned to a department)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.MaterialCategory.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Display order for sorting in dropdowns

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.SerialisedItem
member.summary: Serialised item entity (for tracking individual serial numbers)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.SerialisedItem.Status
member.summary: Status (InWarehouse, WithSI, InstalledAtCustomer, FaultyInWarehouse, InTransitToPartner, RMAClosed, Scrapped)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.SerialisedItem.LastOrderId
member.summary: Last order ID where this item was used

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.StockBalance
member.summary: Stock balance entity (quantity at a location)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.StockLocation.LinkedServiceInstallerId
member.summary: Linked service installer ID (if Type is SI)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.StockLocation.LinkedBuildingId
member.summary: Linked building ID (if Type is CustomerSite)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.StockMovement.MovementType
member.summary: Movement type (GRN, IssueToSI, ReturnFromSI, InstallAtCustomer, ReturnFaulty, RMAOutbound, RMAInbound, Adjust)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Inventory.Entities.StockMovement.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this movement

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Notifications.Entities.NotificationSetting
member.summary: Notification setting entity - user/company notification preferences

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.InstallationType
member.summary: InstallationType entity - represents installation types (FTTH, FTTO, FTTR, FTTC, SDU, RDF_POLE)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.Order
member.summary: Order entity - represents a work order/job

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderBlocker
member.summary: Order blocker entity - represents conditions preventing job progress

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderDocket
member.summary: Order docket entity - links orders to docket files

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderMaterialUsage
member.summary: Order material usage entity - tracks materials used per order

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderReschedule
member.summary: Order reschedule entity - tracks reschedule requests

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderStatusLog
member.summary: Order status log entity - tracks all status changes

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Orders.Entities.OrderType
member.summary: OrderType entity - represents order categories (Activation, ModificationIndoor, ModificationOutdoor, Assurance, ValueAddedService)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Parser.Entities.EmailMessage
member.summary: Email message entity - represents ingested emails

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Parser.Entities.ParsedOrderDraft
member.summary: Parsed order draft entity - intermediate representation before Order creation

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Parser.Entities.ParserRule
member.summary: Parser rule entity - email filtering and routing rules

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Parser.Entities.ParseSession
member.summary: Parse session entity - represents one parsing attempt

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Payroll.Entities.JobEarningRecord.BaseRate
member.summary: Base rate for this job type

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Payroll.Entities.PayrollLine
member.summary: Payroll line entity (per SI in a payroll run)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Payroll.Entities.PayrollPeriod.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this period

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Payroll.Entities.PayrollRun.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this run

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Payroll.Entities.SiRatePlan.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this rate plan is active

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Pnl.Entities.OverheadEntry.AllocationBasis
member.summary: Allocation basis (e.g., percentage to ISP vs Barbershop)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Pnl.Entities.OverheadEntry.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this entry

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Pnl.Entities.PnlPeriod.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this period

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.RMA.Entities.RmaRequest.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this request

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Scheduler.Entities.ScheduledSlot
member.summary: Scheduled slot entity - binding between Order and SI time slot

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Scheduler.Entities.SiAvailability
member.summary: SI availability entity - daily availability per SI

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Scheduler.Entities.SiLeaveRequest
member.summary: SI leave request entity - tracks leave/unavailability

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.ServiceInstallers.Entities.ServiceInstaller
member.summary: Service installer entity - represents SIs (in-house and subcon)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate
member.summary: Document template entity - reusable, versioned templates for document generation

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.DocumentType
member.summary: Document type (Invoice, JobDocket, RmaForm, PaymentReceipt, PnlSummary, GenericLetter)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.PartnerId
member.summary: Partner ID (nullable - if template is partner-specific)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this is the active template for (CompanyId, DocumentType, PartnerId)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.JsonSchema
member.summary: Optional JSON schema describing expected data shape

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this template

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentTemplate.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this template

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GeneratedDocument
member.summary: Generated document entity - represents a single rendered document instance

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GeneratedDocument.ReferenceEntity
member.summary: Reference entity type (Order, Invoice, RmaTicket, PayrollRun, PnlFact, Generic)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GeneratedDocument.TemplateId
member.summary: Template ID used to generate this document

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GeneratedDocument.GeneratedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who generated this document (or System)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GeneratedDocument.MetadataJson
member.summary: Additional metadata as JSON (partnerName, invoiceNo, etc.)

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentPlaceholderDefinition
member.summary: Document placeholder definition - catalogs available placeholder variables

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentPlaceholderDefinition.DocumentType
member.summary: Document type these placeholders apply to

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentPlaceholderDefinition.Description
member.summary: Description of what this placeholder represents

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.DocumentPlaceholderDefinition.IsRequired
member.summary: Whether this placeholder is required in templates of this type

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting
member.summary: Global setting entity - system-wide or default configuration values

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.Value
member.summary: Setting value (stored as string, may contain JSON)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.ValueType
member.summary: Value type (String, Int, Decimal, Bool, Json)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.Description
member.summary: Description of what this setting controls

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.Module
member.summary: Module category (Parser, Email, PnL, Inventory, Security, UI, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the setting was created

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this setting

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the setting was last updated

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.GlobalSetting.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this setting

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile
member.summary: KPI profile entity - defines configurable KPI rules for scheduler and payroll

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.Name
member.summary: Profile name (e.g. "TIME Prelaid KPI", "TIME SDU KPI")

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.OrderType
member.summary: Order type (Activation, Assurance, FTTR, FTTC, SDU, RDFPole, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.MaxJobDurationMinutes
member.summary: Maximum job duration in minutes (target from Assigned → OrderCompleted)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.DocketKpiMinutes
member.summary: Docket KPI in minutes (target time from OrderCompleted → DocketsReceived)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.IsDefault
member.summary: Whether this is the default profile for (CompanyId, OrderType)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.EffectiveTo
member.summary: Effective to date (nullable for ongoing profiles)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this profile

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.KpiProfile.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this profile

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate
member.summary: Material template entity - defines standard material kits per order type/building/partner

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate.OrderType
member.summary: Order type (Activation, Assurance, FTTR, FTTC, SDU, RDFPole, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate.PartnerId
member.summary: Partner ID (nullable - if template is partner-specific)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate.IsDefault
member.summary: Whether this is the default template for (CompanyId, OrderType, BuildingTypeId)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this template

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplate.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this template

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplateItem
member.summary: Material template item - defines a material and quantity in a template

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Settings.Entities.MaterialTemplateItem.IsSerialised
member.summary: Whether this material is serialised (mirror of Material.IsSerialised)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.State
member.summary: Current state of the job (Queued, Running, Succeeded, Failed)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts allowed

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.LastError
member.summary: Last error message if the job failed

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.Priority
member.summary: Priority of the job (higher numbers = higher priority)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job was created

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.StartedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job started processing

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.CompletedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job completed (successfully or failed)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJob.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job was last updated

member.name: F:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.BackgroundJobState.Queued
member.summary: Job is queued and waiting to be processed

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog
member.summary: System log entity - application-level structured logging

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog.DetailsJson
member.summary: Additional structured information in JSON format

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog.UserId
member.summary: User ID who triggered the log entry (if applicable)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog.EntityType
member.summary: Entity type related to this log entry (e.g., "Order", "Invoice")

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog.EntityId
member.summary: Entity ID related to this log entry

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLog.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the log entry was created

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.SystemLogSeverity
member.summary: Enumeration of system log severity levels

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowDefinition
member.summary: Workflow definition entity - defines a workflow configuration for an entity type (e.g., Order, Invoice)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowDefinition.EntityType
member.summary: Entity type this workflow applies to (e.g., "Order", "Invoice")

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowDefinition.PartnerId
member.summary: Optional: Partner ID if this workflow is partner-specific

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowDefinition.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this workflow definition

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowDefinition.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this workflow definition

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob
member.summary: Workflow job entity - represents an in-progress workflow action or scheduled step

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.EntityId
member.summary: ID of the entity being processed

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.CurrentStatus
member.summary: Current business status of the entity

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.State
member.summary: Current state of the workflow job (Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.LastError
member.summary: Last error message if the job failed

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.PayloadJson
member.summary: JSON payload with transition context (actor, metadata, etc.)

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.InitiatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who initiated this workflow job

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.StartedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job started processing

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJob.CompletedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the job completed (successfully or failed)

member.name: F:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowJobState.Pending
member.summary: Job is queued and waiting to be processed

member.name: T:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition
member.summary: Workflow transition entity - defines allowed status transitions within a workflow

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition.AllowedRolesJson
member.summary: JSON array of role names allowed to trigger this transition (e.g., ["Admin", "SI", "Scheduler"])

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition.GuardConditionsJson
member.summary: JSON object defining guard conditions that must be met before transition (e.g., {"photosRequired": true, "docketUploaded": true})

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition.SideEffectsConfigJson
member.summary: JSON object defining side effects/actions on transition (e.g., {"notify": true, "createStockMovement": true})

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who created this transition

member.name: P:CephasOps.Domain.Workflow.Entities.WorkflowTransition.UpdatedByUserId
member.summary: User ID who last updated this transition
